perturbation.original_text: Report to the Reporting Entity within ten (10) business days of discovery any actual or suspected inappropriate use, disclosure , or breach of information from the Michigan Trauma Registry that involves data submitted under this Agreement ;
perturbation.changed_text: Report to the Reporting Entity of discovery any actual or suspected inappropriate use, disclosure , or breach of information from the Michigan Trauma Registry;
perturbation.explanation: By removing 'within ten (10) business days' it introduces ambiguity regarding the required response time. While MDHHS is still obligated to report breaches, the lack of a specific timeframe weakens the clause, and it can be considered contradictory by being un-enforceable.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 5. Report to the Reporting Entity of discovery any actual or suspected inappropriate use, disclosure , or breach of information from the Michigan Trauma Registry that involves data submitted under this Agreement ;
perturbation.justification: The original text specifies a timeframe of 'within ten (10) business days' for reporting breaches. The changed text removes this timeframe, creating ambiguity and weakening the enforceability of the clause. The contradicted text is exactly the same as the changed text; by removing the timeframe from the changed text, and consequently the contradicted text (since they're in the same location), it creates a contradiction with the original text which had a specific timeframe, and now lacks it. This omission directly conflicts with the expectation of a clear deadline, thus creating a strong in-text contradiction.
